design_philosophy: Clean, structural clarity of Computer Science met with the tactile, satisfying interaction of a premium gamified learning app (like a high-end adult Duolingo). Focus on distinct visual states for correctness, deep tactile shadows for interaction, and strong typography without childishness.

typography.guidelines: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Headings must be tight. Definitions (for wrong answers/hints) should be highly legible using IBM Plex Sans.

colors.guidelines: No purple/violet gradients on white. If using tier colors, keep them as solid badges or text colors. Base UI must be starkly clean (Slate/White/Black) so that the feedback colors (Emerald/Red) have maximum impact.

layout_and_spacing.global_spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-12 for main sections. Dashboards use p-6.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Protocol (Control Room Mode). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.puzzle_arena: Center-focused layout. Scrambled letters must use Flexbox with gap-3 or gap-4 and wrap elegantly.

components.anagram_tiles: Tactile Neo-Brutalist. bg-white text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-300 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#cbd5e1] rounded-lg transition-all active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none hover:bg-slate-50 font-mono text-2xl w-14 h-14 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer select-none
components.cards: Clean surface. bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-6.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors
buttons.action: bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-emerald-600 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#059669] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none

components.difficulty_badges: Small pill shapes. px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-full. Color corresponds to tiers.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state.
motion_and_interaction.puzzle_feedback: On correct answer: slight scale-up bounce, text turns emerald. On incorrect answer: rapid horizontal shake (x-axis), text turns red, definition card slides down.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade-in with slight translate-y upward for new levels or dashboard load.

hero_background.description: Abstract shapes to be used lightly behind hero text or auth forms

student_hero.description: Focus student on laptop for the landing page hero section

trophy_icon.description: Gold trophy to be used in achievements or leaderboard empty states

abstract_puzzle_texture.description: Puzzle piece texture for decorative banners or level up screens

testing_conventions.rule: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Implement Shadcn UI for standard components (Dropdowns, Dialogs) but heavily customize them to match the border/shadow styling defined above.
Build the Anagram Tiles from scratch using pure HTML/Tailwind classes provided in 'anagram_tiles' to ensure tactile feel.
Implement contextual feedback layout: When wrong answer is submitted, animate a definition card appearing smoothly under the puzzle.
Dashboards must use the Bento Grid strategy. Top left is primary metric (Current Points/Level).
Ensure all buttons and inputs have the required data-testid.
